<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Delete Enterprise SSO Organization"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/projects/{project_id}/organizations/{organization_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
></MethodEndpoint>

Deprecated: use setProject or patchProjectWithRevision instead

Irrecoverably deletes an Enterprise SSO Organization in a project by its ID.
